items.title: Robbie Williams, Tom Cruise and Jennifer Hudson among stars at World Cup closing ceremony
items.summary: The celebrity line-up will continue at half-time with performances by Madonna, Justin Bieber, Shakira and BTS.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Lisandro Martinez injury update: What happened to Argentina star and will he return vs Spain?
items.summary: Lisandro Martínez suffered an injury during the 2026 FIFA World Cup final against Spain at MetLife Stadium on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Duckett 141 trumps Rohit 138 in Lord's run-fest
items.summary: England set India 388 in this series decider, and then refused to blink with the ball to secure a 2-1 series win - their first against India since 2018
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
